summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Hydrated security-sensitive PRs #83517 and #83632 are routed to central security handling. Hydrated non-security PRs are kept independent for maintainer review because this shard has no shared canonical and merge/fix are blocked. The remaining listed candidates need fresh hydration before classification because the preflight artifact only contains unavailable live state for them.
